announcement_body.headline: Minor Update - 06-04-2026
announcement_body.body: [p]- Urn mechanics have been reworked.[/p][p][/p][p]Primary details:[/p][p]- Delivering the urn now starts a king of the hill style capture point, rather than using melee to flip the urn back and forth.[/p][p]- Both teams can progress at the same time, but the urn will only be fully claimed once there is only one team in the circle.[/p][p]- The Urn runner now gets their normal 35% bonus bounty and stats immediately on initial deposit (rather than on deposit conclusion only if your team won it)[/p][p][/p][p][/p][p]Other Details:[/p][p]- Urn overall bounty reduced by 20% (unreduced for trailing team)[/p][p]- Progress radius is 20m[/p][p]- Progress rate is fixed regardless the number of allies in the area[/p][p]- Progress duration for favored/neutral/unfavored is 6/12/18s[/p][p]- If Urn has been in progress for over 75s, it will give up and throw all the souls as orbs into the sky (they will float for a long time)[/p][p]- Increased time allowed to run the urn before taking damage by 10s[/p][p]- Trailing team sprint speed bonus from +4m to +5m[/p][p]- Urn comeback resistance now also grants +35% Debuff Resistance ontop of the 35% Bullet and Spirit Resistance[/p][p]- Urn comeback resistance aura reduced from 60m to match the 20m progress radius[/p][p]- Drop off location is above the bridges on the side lanes, rather than below.[/p]

announcement_body.body: [p]- Apollo: Disengaging Sigil T2 increased from +20% Fire Rate to +30%[/p][p]- Apollo: Flawless Advance T1 heal from 30+0.75 to 35+1.0[/p][p]- Apollo: Flawless Advance T2 increased from -10s Cooldown to -12s[/p][p]- Apollo: Itani Lo Sahn damage increased from 190 to 200[/p][p]- Apollo: Itani Lo Sahn spirit scaling increased from 2.3 to 2.6[/p][p]- Graves: Jar of Dead damage reduced from 20 + 0.31/spirit to 17 + 0.27/spirit[/p][p]- Graves: Ghouls damage reduced by 15%[/p][p]- Graves: Ghouls bounty increased from 25+1/min to 35+2/min[/p][p]- McGinnis: Heavy Barrage range reduced from 50m to 36m[/p][p]- McGinnis: Heavy Barrage T1 Dash Slow reduced from 30% to 18% (regular slow still 30%)[/p][p]- McGinnis: Heavy Barrage T3 Damage Per Rocket reduced from +18 to +15[/p][p]- Pocket: Flying Cloak T3 reduced from -14s Cooldown to -13s[/p][p]- Pocket: Affliction T3 reduced from +18 DPS to +14[/p][p]- Silver: Slam Fire Current Health as Damage reduced from 3% to 2.5%[/p][p]- Silver: Slam Fire T3 reduced from 8% Current Health as Damage to 7%[/p][p]- Silver: Entangling Bola cooldown increased from 20s to 23s[/p][p]- Silver: Entangling Bola T2 increased from -5s Cooldown to -8s[/p][p]- Silver: Lycan Curse Fire Rate reduced from 65% to 60%[/p][p]- Victor: Shocking Reanimation T3 reduced from -130s Cooldown to -120s[/p][p]- Yamato: Power Slash spirit scaling reduced from 2.1 to 1.85[/p][p]- Yamato: Flying Slash cast range reduced from 30m to 28m[/p]

announcement_body.headline: Minor Update - 05-28-2026
announcement_body.body: [p]- Urn spawn time and interval changed from 10/15/20/25/etc to 12/18/24/30/etc[/p][p]- Urn timer now gets frozen with Frozen Shelter[/p][p]- Urn no longer provides the +35% Bullet and Spirit Resist aura for the behind team when it is being carried or dropped. The aura is now only active when it is being deposited. [/p][p]- Urn runner when behind now gains +35% Bullet and Spirit Resist for themselves only[/p][p]- Fixed the trailing team Urn runner's extra sprint bonus not working properly[/p][p]- Urn will do damage to the runner after a team has held it for 30s (was 50s before), however, this timer will freeze while there are enemies within a 40m radius of the urn runner.[/p][p]- Urn will now always add at least 2s to the team 30s held timer limit anytime it is picked up, even if it is instantly dropped[/p][p]- You are no longer prevented from picking up the urn for 12s after it is dropped after the previous 50s team held timer[/p][p]- The conditions for when the Urn decides to run back home have been reworked. The Urn will now stay in place on the ground as long as there are enemies in a 40m radius (enemies of the last person to have dropped or fumbled the Urn). If there are no enemies, then the Urn will wait up to 13s if there is a friendly player in a 40m radius.[/p][p]- If the Urn held timer is over 45s (keeping in mind this timer is frozen if there are nearby enemies), the next time it is dropped it will immediately run back home if there are no nearby enemies.[/p][p][/p][p]- Parrying a trooper no longer resets your parry cooldown (however it won't end your parry early like a hero hit does)[/p][p]- Parrying a trooper now stuns the trooper[/p]

announcement_body.headline: Minor Update - 05-25-2026
announcement_body.body:
[p]- Urn drop off point is moved from the above bridge in the mid lane to under the bridge in the side lane
- Urn timer extension when contested increased from 1.25s to 3s
- Urn deposit timers for favored/neutral/unfavored increased from 3/5/10s to 5/10/15s
- Urn comeback bullet and spirit resist auras reduced from 50% to 35%
- Urn pickup spot is now where the old comeback drop off spots were for when your team is behind
- Urn runner no longer has sprint disabled
- Urn runner now has max sprint acceleration
- Urn runner now gains +2m Sprint, +1 Stamina, +10% Dash Distance and +15% Stamina Regen
- Urn runner for the team that is behind now gains an extra +4m Sprint
- Urn collision radius increased by 20%
- Various smaller urn holding timers and variables adjusted to account for the new location

Please continue to give feedback on the Urn as we work through iterations on it.[/p]

][/b][/p][p][/p][p]- We are experimenting with an alternate set of Urn mechanics. Please give us your thoughts on this after you've played with it some.[/p][p][/p][p][u]Primary Rules:[/u][/p][p]- To pickup the Urn, rather than standing in place to channel, you now light or heavy melee the Urn to pick it up.[/p][p]- The Urn is now always dropped off on top of the bridge on the middle of the map.[/p][p]- Once dropped off, the Urn will go into a "Depositing" phase for a set amount of time, depending on which team the urn favors (3s/5s/10s for Favored/Neutral/Unfavored).[/p][p]- While in the Depositing phase, the enemy team can Heavy Melee the urn to have their team claim it and cause it to switch sides. This adds +1.25s to that team's timer.[/p][p]- If the urn is Favored or Unfavored (in a comeback state), then the Favored team will get +50% Bullet and Spirit Resist in a 60m radius around the urn while it is being carried, dropped or deposited.[/p][p][/p][p][/p][p][u]Other Details:[/u][/p][p]- After 35s (aggregate time held per team), the carrier will start taking 5% Max HP damage per second (previously was 45s and 0.15% Max HP damage).[/p][p]- Urn damage is lethal[/p][p]- Like before, when the Urn is fumbled, it will wait 13s if there is a player within 25m. However afterwards, with this new version, it can no longer be picked up anymore and will very quickly run back to its spawn position.[/p][p]- No longer silences you while carrying. You are still disarmed and movement silenced.[/p][p]- No longer grants +30% Bullet and Spirit Resist while carrying it[/p][p]- Area around deposting the urn is revealed (urn runner is also revealed as usual)[/p][p]- The rules for Favored/Unfavored remain the same (+15% soul difference for the first urn at 10:00, +10% for all future urns)[/p][p]- Souls are all instant after the deposit is complete[/p][p]- All rewards are the same.
